sentiment: Beneath the ash of centuries, a voice still waits to be heard.

stories.title: An entire Herculaneum scroll has been read for the first time
stories.summary: AI-assisted imaging has decoded an entire carbonized scroll from Herculaneum, the first complete ancient text recovered from the volcanic ruins.

stories.title: Om Malik has died
stories.summary: Tech journalist and GigaOM founder Om Malik passed away at 59, remembered for decades of thoughtful technology writing.

stories.title: Why current LLM costs are not sustainable
stories.summary: An analysis arguing that the economics of large language model inference remain unprofitable at current pricing.
